news.title: Screens in Schools: New Screen-Time Debate Means for Educators
news.summary: Updated AAP guidance and new research spark renewed debate about screen use in classrooms. Schools caught between pressure to increase tech integration and growing evidence of screen-related developmental concerns. Some states pushing "screen-free schools" legislation.

news.title: The AI Use Case Question Teachers Are Still Asking
news.summary: Despite rapid AI adoption in schools, teachers continue to struggle with the fundamental question: "What actual use cases make sense for my classroom?" The article explores the gap between AI hype and practical classroom implementation, finding that educators need concrete, subject-specific examples rather than generic tool demonstrations.

news.title: Which Education Jobs Are Growing the Fastest? Mostly Non-Classroom Roles
news.summary: New analysis shows education sector job growth is concentrated in non-teaching positions: instructional coordinators, edtech specialists, and student support services. Traditional classroom teacher roles show minimal growth while administrative and technical roles expand rapidly.

news.title: With Teens Comfortable Confiding in AI, Should Schools Embrace It for Mental Health Care?
news.summary: Research shows teenagers increasingly prefer sharing emotional struggles with AI chatbots over human counselors. Schools face difficult decisions about integrating AI mental health tools amid counselor shortages and rising youth mental health crisis.

news.title: EcoThink: 40% Inference Energy Reduction for AI Agents
news.summary: Adaptive inference framework that skips unnecessary Chain-of-Thought reasoning for simple queries while reserving deep computation for complex logic. Uses lightweight distillation-based router to dynamically assess query complexity. Achieves up to 81.9% energy reduction for web knowledge retrieval without performance loss.

news.title: Voxtral TTS: Frontier Text-to-Speech with 68.4% Win Rate vs ElevenLabs
news.summary: Mistral releases frontier-grade text-to-speech model that generates natural, lifelike speech from just 3 seconds of reference audio. Uses a hybrid architecture combining flow-matching with autoregressive components. Released under CC BY-NC license with open weights.

news.title: WildASR: Voice Agent Hallucination Risk in Real-World Conditions
news.summary: Multilingual diagnostic benchmark (4 languages) from real human speech that isolates ASR failure factors: environmental degradation, demographic shift, and linguistic diversity. Critical finding: ASR models hallucinate plausible but unspoken content under degraded inputs, creating safety risks for downstream voice agents.

news.title: WriteBack-RAG: First Framework for Trainable Knowledge Bases
news.summary: Treats the RAG knowledge base as a trainable component rather than static corpus. Uses labeled examples to identify successful retrieval, isolate relevant documents, and distill them into compact knowledge units. Achieves +2.14% average improvement across 4 RAG methods, 6 benchmarks, 2 LLM backbones.

Reduces inference energy by 40.4% average (up to 81.9% for web knowledge retrieval) without performance loss.

news.summary: Study of GPT-4 and GPT-5 on PROCESSBENCH finds assessment accuracy is higher on problems the same model solved correctly. But assessment remains harder than solving, especially on error-present solutions. Math expertise supports assessment but step-level diagnosis requires additional capabilities.

news.title: AnalogAgent: Self-Improving Analog Circuit Design with LLM Agents

news.title: Completeness of Best-First Minimax Proven
news.summary: Proves that the "completion technique" enables Unbounded Best-First Minimax and Descent Minimax to always find winning strategies - closing an open theoretical question. These algorithms are core to knowledge-free reinforcement learning.

news.title: Markovian Framework for Agentic AI Reliability & Oversight Cost
news.summary: Measure-theoretic framework linking statistical credibility to oversight cost in agentic AI. Introduces blind-spot mass, entropy-based escalation gates. Validated on 251K enterprise procurement cases - predicts autonomous step accuracy within 3.4 percentage points.

news.title: Multi-Agent Medical MCQA: 49-74% ECE Reduction via Consistency Verification
news.summary: Multi-agent framework combining domain-specific specialists (respiratory, cardiology, neurology, gastroenterology) with Two-Phase Verification and S-Score Weighted Fusion. On MedQA-250, achieves ECE = 0.091 (74.4% reduction) - critical for clinical AI deferral signals.

news.title: Standardized Benchmarks for Multi-Objective Search (MOS)
news.summary: First comprehensive benchmark suite for exact and approximate multi-objective search. Spans roads, synthetic graphs, games, and robotics. Reveals DIMACS road networks fail diverse Pareto structures - fixing a 20-year evaluation gap.

news.summary: New proposals would push back looming deadlines for watermarking AI-generated content and high-risk AI systems. Major regulatory relief for AI companies struggling to comply with EU AI Act requirements.

news.title: OpenAI Pauses ChatGPT 'Adult Mode' Plans
news.summary: Much like Sora, OpenAI says it's pausing plans for ChatGPT's 'adult mode' to focus on core products. Strategic pivot away from controversial features toward business-critical offerings.

news.title: Europe's Renewable Investment Paying Off During Energy Crisis
news.summary: Spain and France are expected to weather the Iran war energy crisis better than oil-dependent neighbors thanks to heavy renewable and nuclear investment. Europe as a whole faring better due to continued solar and wind deployment.

news.title: Google and Tesla Launch Utilize Coalition for Grid Efficiency
news.summary: New initiative aims to use battery storage and virtual power plants to make more efficient use of existing grid electrons. Plan supposed to make electricity more affordable amid growing opposition to data centers.

news.title: Lake Tahoe Loses Power Supply as Data Center Demand Soars
news.summary: NV Energy has decided to stop selling power to a small utility serving 49,000 customers in Lake Tahoe. Data center requests are driving a tripling of expected peak power demand. The utility says it faces "unprecedented times."

news.title: Campaigners Welcome Meta and YouTube's Defeat in Addiction Trial
news.summary: $6M verdict against Meta and YouTube celebrated by campaigners. Decision could have implications for hundreds of other cases in the US. UK watching closely for regulatory implications.

news.title: Ex-Taiwan Presidential Hopeful Sentenced to 17 Years for Corruption
news.summary: Ko Wen-je, former Taiwan presidential candidate, sentenced to 17 years for corruption. Supporters describe charges as politically motivated.

news.title: Israel Kills Iran's Navy Chief Overseeing Hormuz Blockade
news.summary: Israel has killed Iran's navy chief who was overseeing the Strait of Hormuz blockade. The strait, one of the world's busiest oil shipping channels, has been effectively blocked by Iran since the outbreak of the war last month.

news.title: Philippines Transport Workers Strike Over Fuel Costs
news.summary: Transport workers in the Philippines are striking over fuel costs. A ship carrying Russian crude oil arrived earlier this week as the country seeks alternative energy sources.

news.title: Trump Confirms May Meeting with Xi Jinping - Iran War Forces Postponement
news.summary: Trump's delayed meeting with Xi Jinping will be the first visit to China by a US president since 2017. The Iran war has forced postponement of earlier planned meetings.

news.title: Completeness of Unbounded Best-First Minimax and Descent Minimax
news.summary: Proves that completion technique sufficiently improves Unbounded Best-First Minimax and Descent Minimax algorithms to always determine winning strategies in two-player perfect information games. These are core algorithms in state-of-the-art knowledge-free reinforcement learning.

news.title: Markovian Framework for Pre-Deployment Reliability and Oversight-Cost Auditing in Agentic AI
news.summary: Develops measure-theoretic Markov framework for auditing agentic AI reliability in organizations. Uses blind-spot mass and entropy-based escalation gates. Demonstrated on 251,734 enterprise procurement cases with accuracy tracking within 3.4 percentage points.

news.title: Multi-Agent Reasoning with Consistency Verification Improves Uncertainty Calibration in Medical MCQA
news.summary: Multi-agent framework combining domain specialists with Two-Phase Verification achieves 49-74% reduction in Expected Calibration Error across medical MCQA benchmarks. On MedQA-250: ECE = 0.091 (74.4% reduction) with AUROC = 0.630.

news.title: Self-Improving Analog Circuit Design Automation with LLM Agents
news.summary: AnalogAgent is a training-free agentic framework that uses multi-agent coordination with self-evolving memory for analog circuit design. Achieves 97.4% Pass@1 with GPT-5 and 92% with Gemini. With compact models like Qwen-8B, yields +48.8% average improvement.

news.title: Standardized Benchmarks for Multi-Objective Search
news.summary: Introduces first comprehensive benchmark suite for multi-objective search, spanning road networks, synthetic graphs, game environments, and robotic motion planning. Reveals DIMACS road networks have highly correlated objectives that fail to capture diverse Pareto-front structures.

news.title: Dutch Schools Phone Ban Shows Results After Two Years
news.summary: Netherlands banned phones in schools two years ago. Now government wants to go further, pushing to restrict social media for under-16s. Early results show improved student performance.

news.title: Iran War: Trump Says Tehran "Afraid" to Admit Talks
news.summary: Iran's foreign minister says they have "no intention of negotiating for now" as White House insists war goals almost met. Gulf aviation faces turbulence as prolonged conflict threatens hub airports and flight routes.

news.title: Meta & YouTube Found Liable in Social Media Addiction Trial - $6M Awarded
news.summary: A woman has been awarded $6 million in a landmark verdict against Meta and YouTube. The companies were found liable for social media addiction - a decision that could have implications for hundreds of other cases in the US.

news.title: Octopus Energy: 50% Rise in Solar Panel Sales Since Iran War
news.summary: UK energy giant Octopus reports 50% surge in solar panel installations since Iran war began. Chief executive Greg Jackson optimistic but making contingency plans for prolonged energy uncertainty.

news.title: One Nation Makes Big Poll Gains, Shaking Up Politics
news.summary: Pauline Hanson's One Nation riding wave of popularity driven by voters weary of mainstream parties. Right-wing populist gains could reshape Australian political landscape.

news.title: DJI Sues Insta360 Over 360-Degree Drone - Days Before Launching Its Own
news.summary: DJI is suing Insta360 claiming the company hired DJI employees who gave it technology belonging to DJI. Comes just days before DJI launches its own 360-degree drone, the Avata 360. Insta360's CEO has responded.

news.title: Polar Launches Street X Smartwatch at $249.99
news.summary: New durable smartwatch launched at $249.99 - much more affordable than the $999.99 Grit X2 Pro. Features 1.28-inch AMOLED display, barometer, skin temperature sensor, fitness tracking.

news.title: Ring Announces New 4K Doorbell, Three 2K Models Starting at $80
news.summary: Ring expanding video doorbell lineup with new 4K model and three 2K options, prices starting at $80. Broadens consumer smart home options at various price points.

news.summary: Anthropic upgrades their smartest model with major improvements in agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance tasks.

news.summary: Studio's $1 billion plans to collaborate with OpenAI and Epic Games seem to be collapsing. Major setback for AI-entertainment partnerships.

news.summary: Zuckerberg developing AI agent to help him do his job - retrieving answers faster by bypassing layers of people.

news.summary: Middle East conflict has caused fuel shortages across Asia. Philippines declared an energy emergency. Japan reports panic buying of toilet paper. Shorter showers and no street lights in some Asian cities. Iran has rejected Trump's 15-point ceasefire plan but made a counteroffer.

news.title: Meta & Google Found Liable in Landmark Social Media Addiction Trial
news.summary: A US jury found Meta and Google negligent in the design of their apps and failed to warn about dangers. This is the first major verdict holding tech giants liable for social media addiction, opening the door to massive liability claims.

news.title: NASA Pivots to Moon Base, Nuclear Propulsion in Multi-Billion Expansion
news.summary: NASA announces major strategic shift: swapping International Space Station focus for moon base development and nuclear-powered Mars propulsion. Multi-billion-dollar program expansion signals new space race priorities.

news.title: New Hong Kong Password Laws Force Surrender of Device Access
news.summary: Hong Kong has enacted laws requiring people to surrender passwords to authorities. Foreigners could be caught up in the new regulations, raising concerns for business travelers and tech workers.

news.title: Robot Joins Melania Trump at White House Event
news.summary: First Lady Melania Trump hosted an American-made humanoid robot at a White House event, using the appearance to promote AI for teaching in schools. The robot was described as the "White House's first American-made humanoid guest."

news.title: Amazon Acquires Fauna Robotics - Enters Humanoid Robot Market
news.summary: Amazon has acquired Fauna Robotics, the startup behind the 3.5-foot bipedal robot "Sprout". Roughly 50 staffers will join Amazon. While Bloomberg reports Amazon won't deploy the robot in operations, leaked documents reveal Amazon's goal to replace 600,000 future workers with automation.

news.title: Dell Launches Supercapacitor Mouse & Keyboard - 5-Second Charge
news.summary: Dell's new Pro 7 keyboard and mouse use supercapacitors instead of batteries. A 5-second charge powers a full day's work; 5 minutes gives 3 months of keyboard use or 1.5 months for the mouse. Shipping April 16th.

news.title: HP Announces 30+ Business Laptops, Only One with Qualcomm

news.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra Repairability Scored 5/10 by iFixit
news.summary: iFixit called the S26 Ultra's screen repair path "one of the ugliest in a flagship phone" due to the built-in privacy display. While Samsung showed understanding of repair-friendly hardware, they "keep stopping short of fully committing to it."

news.title: Samsung Kills QN90, Restructures 2026 TV Lineup
news.summary: Samsung's flagship mini LED since 2021, the QN90, is discontinued as the company shifts toward RGB LED TVs. The QN80H and QN70H remain as main quantum dot 4K mini-LED options. A new "Mini LED TV" line offers 11 less expensive, non-QD options.

news.title: Adobe Photoshop Beta: Rotate Object Feature
news.summary: New tool lets you turn 2D images into 3D-rotatable objects. The Verge found it "sloppy" - gives objects AI-generated look.

news.title: NC Man Pleads Guilty to $8M AI Music Fraud

news.title: Reddit CEO: Human Verification Will Be Rare

news.title: Signal Creator Working with Meta on Encrypted AI
news.summary: Moxie Marlinspike's Confer to integrate privacy technology with Meta AI for end-to-end encrypted AI chats.

news.title: Beyond Preset Identities: How Agents Form Stances and Boundaries in Generative Societies
news.summary: Discovers that AI agents exhibit endogenous stances that override preset identities, consistently demonstrating an innate progressive bias. Advanced models show 40% Trust-Action Decoupling - altering stances despite reporting low trust. Agents actively dismantle assigned power hierarchies and reconstruct community boundaries.

news.title: Bilevel Autoresearch: Meta-Autoresearching Itself
news.summary: A groundbreaking framework where an outer LLM loop meta-optimizes the inner autoresearch loop by generating new search mechanisms as Python code at runtime. The system autonomously discovers optimization techniques from combinatorial optimization, multi-armed bandits, and design of experiments without human specification.

news.title: LLM Olympiad: Why Model Evaluation Needs a Sealed Exam
news.summary: Proposes Olympiad-style evaluation: sealed problems, frozen submissions, standardized harness. After scoring, full task set and code released for audit. Makes performance harder to "manufacture" and easier to trust.

news.title: Mecha-nudges for Machines: Optimizing Choice Architecture for AI Agents
news.summary: Introduces "mecha-nudges" - changes to choice presentation that systematically influence AI agents without degrading human decision environments. Uses Bayesian persuasion with V-usable information framework. Evidence shows Etsy listings have more machine-usable information post-ChatGPT release.

news.title: RelayS2S: A Dual-Path Speculative Generation for Real-Time Dialogue
news.summary: Hybrid architecture running two paths in parallel: fast S2S model for low-latency response prefix while cascaded ASR-LLM pipeline generates quality continuation. Achieves P90 latency of S2S with 99% cascaded response quality.

news.title: Anthropic Launches Science Blog

news.title: GGML & llama.cpp Join Hugging Face

news.summary: Uses autoresearch loop to optimize itself - outer loop meta-optimizes inner loop by generating new search mechanisms as Python code at runtime. Achieves 5x improvement on Karpathy's GPT pretraining benchmark. Discovers mechanisms from combinatorial optimization, multi-armed bandits, and design of experiments autonomously.

news.title: LLM Olympiad: Why Model Evaluation Needs a Sealed Exam
news.summary: Argues for Olympiad-style evaluation: problems sealed until evaluation, submissions frozen in advance, standardized harness. After scoring, full task set and code released for audit. Makes strong performance harder to "manufacture" and easier to trust.

news.title: RelayS2S: Dual-Path Speculative Generation for Real-Time Dialogue
news.summary: Hybrid architecture running two paths in parallel: fast S2S model drafts response prefix for low-latency audio onset, slow ASR→LLM pipeline generates higher-quality continuation. Lightweight learned verifier gates handoff. Achieves P90 latency comparable to S2S while retaining 99% cascaded response quality.

news.title: WordPress.com Enables AI Agents via MCP
news.summary: AI agents like Claude and ChatGPT can now draft and publish blog posts via Model Context Protocol. Posts start as drafts for human review before publishing.

news.title: GSEM: Graph-based Self-Evolving Memory for Clinical Reasoning
news.summary: Clinical memory framework organizing experiences into dual-layer memory graph, capturing decision structure and relational dependencies. Supports online feedback-driven calibration. Achieves 70.90% accuracy on MedR-Bench with DeepSeek-V3.2, 69.24% with Qwen3.5-35B.

news.title: High-Rank DoRA via Factored Norms and Fused Kernels
news.summary: DoRA requires materializing dense weight products at high rank, causing memory issues. Factored norm eliminates dense product. Fused Triton kernels reduce memory traffic 4x. 1.5-2.0x faster inference, 1.5-1.9x faster gradients, 7GB lower peak VRAM on 8-32B VLMs.

news.title: MARCUS: Agentic Multimodal VLM for Cardiac Diagnosis
news.summary: End-to-end interpretation of ECGs, echocardiograms, and cardiac MRI using hierarchical agentic architecture with modality-specific expert models. Trained on 13.5M images and 1.6M Q&A pairs. Achieves 87-91% accuracy on ECG, 67-86% on echo, 85-88% on CMR - outperforming GPT-5 Thinking and Gemini 2.5 Pro by 34-45%.

news.title: MemDLM: Memory-Enhanced Diffusion Language Model Training
news.summary: Addresses train-inference mismatch in Diffusion LMs by embedding simulated denoising into training via Bi-level Optimization. Inner loop updates fast weights (Parametric Memory), outer loop updates base model. Emergent in-weight retrieval mechanism improves needle-in-haystack tasks.

news.title: Voice Interfaces Amplify AI Discrimination
news.summary: Audio-enabled LLMs exhibit systematic gender discrimination based solely on speaker voice, shifting responses toward gender-stereotyped content beyond text-based bias. Survey (n=1,000) shows infrequent chatbot users are most likely to disengage when attribute inference is revealed. Pitch manipulation can mitigate discriminatory outputs.

news.title: Google DeepMind: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Released
news.summary: New lightweight model "built for intelligence at scale" joins Gemini 3.1 family. Also: cognitive framework paper for measuring AGI progress.

news.title: Hugging Face: EVA Framework for Voice Agents
news.summary: New framework for evaluating voice agents. Also: State of Open Source Spring 2026 report, Holotron-12B computer use agent released.

news.title: Meta AI Moderation to Replace Contractors
news.summary: AI support assistant rolling out for Facebook/Instagram. Will reduce reliance on third-party vendors for content enforcement.

news.title: Microsoft MAI-Image-2 Released
news.summary: Second-gen AI image model with enhanced photorealism and reliable text generation. Rolling out in Copilot and Bing Image Creator.

news.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang: "We've Achieved AGI"
news.summary: On Lex Fridman podcast, Huang declared AGI achieved, citing broad AI agent adoption. Critics note: "Anything can be AGI if you're vague enough in defining it."

news.title: OpenAI in Talks to Buy Power from Helion Fusion
news.summary: Sam Altman stepped down from Helion board as OpenAI negotiates electricity purchase from his nuclear fusion startup. Fusion still needs major scientific breakthroughs to become viable.

news.title: Pentagon vs Anthropic Lawsuit Update
news.summary: DoD filed rebuttal alleging Anthropic could "disable its technology during warfighting operations" - deemed unacceptable national security risk.

news.title: Samsung Invests $73B in AI Chip Expansion
news.summary: 22% increase in 2026 to challenge SK Hynix as Nvidia's memory provider. Co-CEO cites "agentic AI" demand fueling orders for advanced robotics.

news.title: Signal Creator Working with Meta on Encrypted AI
news.summary: Moxie Marlinspike announces collaboration to integrate Confer's privacy technology to underpin Meta AI encryption.

news.title: Zuckerberg Building AI CEO Agent for Himself
news.summary: Meta CEO developing personal AI agent to help with CEO duties. Retrieves information faster by bypassing management layers. Still in development.

news.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang: "I Think We've Achieved AGI"
news.summary: On Lex Fridman podcast, Jensen Huang declared "I think we've achieved AGI" when asked about AGI timeline. Fridman defined AGI as AI that can "essentially do your job" - start, grow, run a successful tech company worth $1B+. Huang cited OpenClaw's viral success as example of individual AI agents doing real work. But he walked back slightly: "The odds of 100,000 of those agents building Nvidia is zero percent."

news.title: Australia Relaxes Diesel Standards Amid Fuel Shortages
news.summary: Government relaxes diesel standards to address fuel shortages caused by Iran war disruption to Strait of Hormuz shipping. Emergency measure to keep supply chains moving. Panic buying reported at some fuel stations.

news.title: China Dials Back Fuel Price Hikes to "Reduce Burden"
news.summary: Chinese government limits fuel price increases to protect consumers from Iran war energy shock. Part of broader regional response to soaring fuel costs. Slovenia has already introduced rationing (50L/day).

news.title: Israel Plans to Occupy Southern Lebanon to Litani River
news.summary: BREAKING: Israel's defense minister announces plan to create "security zone" from Blue Line (Israel-Lebanon border) to Litani River. Destroyed 5 bridges over the river. "Hundreds of thousands of residents who evacuated will not return until security is guaranteed." 1,000+ killed in Lebanon including 100+ children. 1 million displaced. Echoes 1982-2000 occupation.

news.title: Starlink Blocked from Operating in Namibia
news.summary: Namibia rejects Starlink license application. Reason: Namibian subsidiary lacks required 51% local ownership. Second setback in southern Africa after South Africa blocked entry over similar rules. Musk criticized "racist ownership laws" on X. Regulator says decision can be reconsidered within 90 days.

news.title: Nvidia CEO: AGI Achieved, Individual AI Agents Going Mainstream
news.summary: Jensen Huang on Lex Fridman declared AGI achieved. Cited OpenClaw and other AI agent platforms as examples of individuals using AI to do real work. "I wouldn't be surprised if some social thing happened or somebody created a digital influencer... and it become out of the blue an instant success."

news.title: Farmers Label EU Trade Deal "Worst Ever"
news.summary: Australian farmers criticizing the newly-signed EU free trade agreement as inadequate, particularly on red meat access. NFF says better to have no deal than bad deal. Compromises made on beef/lamb quotas due to Trump administration pressure on global trade.

news.title: Iran Shows Europe "In Reach" with 4,000km Missile Test
news.summary: Iran launched longest-ever ballistic missile strike attempt at Diego Garcia US-UK base in Indian Ocean (4,000km from Iran). One intercepted, one failed. Shatters assumption of Iran's 2,000km self-imposed limit. Israel warns European capitals (Berlin, Paris, Rome) now in range.

news.title: Japan Consumers Panic Buy Toilet Paper
news.summary: Japanese consumers panic buying toilet paper amid Iran war supply chain concerns. Japan heavily dependent on imported paper products. Reflects broader Asian consumer anxiety about supply disruptions.

news.title: US Bans All Foreign-Made Consumer Internet Routers
news.summary: FCC added all consumer-grade routers made outside the US to its banned equipment list. New device models require FCC approval before import/sale. Companies must disclose foreign investors and provide plan to bring manufacturing to US. Affects TP-Link, Netgear (US company but manufactures abroad). Only exception: Starlink routers made in Texas.

news.title: Doctronic Raises $40M Series B for AI Doctor Service
news.summary: AI doctor startup Doctronic raised $40M Series B led by Abstract and Lightspeed Venture Partners. Total funding now $65M across 3 rounds in less than a year. Core service: chatbot + telehealth clinician for $39 fee. Founded 2023, launched Jan 2025, on track for $10M+ revenue this year.

news.title: Australia-EU Free Trade Agreement Finally Reached
news.summary: After almost a decade of negotiations, Australia and the EU will sign a free trade pact. The deal slashes tariffs, improves critical minerals trade, and creates new labor mobility arrangements. Compromises made on luxury car tax and agricultural products due to Trump administration pressure on global trade.

news.title: Fuel Security Crisis Highlights Renewable Energy Advantage
news.summary: Iran war exposes Australia's fuel import dependence. Country has ~32-36 days of fuel reserves. EVs already adding 1.2 days to supply. If Australia matched Norway's EV uptake, it could add 11 days (30% increase) to reserves.

news.title: Hong Kong Police Can Now Demand Phone Passwords
news.summary: New national security rules allow HK police to demand phone passwords. Non-compliance can result in up to 1 year jail and HK$100,000 fine. Further erosion of digital privacy rights in the territory.

news.title: Iran War Continues, Trump Says "One More Chance at Peace"
news.summary: US president says he postponed strikes on Iranian power plants after "very good and productive" talks. Tehran denies any talks took place. Oil prices fall and stock markets rebound on de-escalation hopes. Slovenia becomes first EU country to introduce fuel rationing (50L/day).

news.title: Italy's Meloni Vulnerable After Referendum Defeat
news.summary: Italian PM Giorgia Meloni lost constitutional reform referendum that became a referendum on her government. Vows to press on but political instability increases in EU's third-largest economy.

news.title: Adobe Photoshop Beta: Rotate Object Feature
news.summary: The Verge tested Adobe's new Rotate Object tool in Photoshop Beta. The feature lets you turn 2D images into 3D-rotatable objects, but results were "sloppy" and gave objects an "AI-generated look." Fun but not super useful yet.

news.title: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.6 Released
news.summary: Upgraded smartest model with industry-leading performance across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance - often by wide margins.

news.title: DeepMind: Measuring Progress Toward AGI
news.summary: New cognitive framework paper for measuring progress toward AGI. Part of broader research initiative including 10-year AlphaGo impact retrospective.

news.title: Google DeepMind: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Released
news.summary: New lightweight Gemini model "built for intelligence at scale" released March 2026. Joins Gemini 3.1 Pro and Gemini 3 Deep Think in the model family.

news.title: Hugging Face: GGML & llama.cpp Join HF
news.summary: Major integration for Local AI ecosystem. Also launched Storage Buckets on Hub, LeRobot v0.5.0, and Modular Diffusers for composable pipelines.

news.title: IBM Releases Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite Libraries Release 4
news.summary: IBM updates its open-source AI toolkit with new Mellea version and Granite libraries. Continues IBM's push into enterprise AI tooling.

news.title: Meta AI Moderation to Replace Contractors
news.summary: AI support assistant rolling out for Facebook/Instagram. Will reduce reliance on third-party vendors for content enforcement, handling repetitive reviews of graphic content.

news.title: Microsoft MAI-Image-2 Launched
news.summary: Second-gen AI image model with enhanced photorealism and reliable text generation. Rolling out in Copilot and Bing Image Creator.

news.title: Mistral AI Introduces Forge for Enterprise
news.summary: Platform enables enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in proprietary knowledge. Partners include ASML, Ericsson, ESA. Supports pre-training, RL, dense and MoE architectures.

news.title: NVIDIA: Build Domain-Specific Embedding Models in Under a Day
news.summary: New Hugging Face blog from NVIDIA shows how to fine-tune embedding models for specific domains quickly. Part of ongoing NVIDIA-HF partnership for enterprise AI.

news.title: OpenAI in Talks to Buy Electricity from Sam Altman's Helion Fusion
news.summary: OpenAI negotiating power purchase from Helion Energy, the nuclear fusion startup founded by Sam Altman. Altman has stepped down as Helion's board chair and recused himself from discussions to address conflict of interest concerns.

news.title: Samsung Invests $73B in AI Chip Expansion
news.summary: 22% increase in 2026 to challenge SK Hynix as Nvidia's memory provider. Co-CEO cites "agentic AI" demand fueling orders for future-oriented sectors like advanced robotics.

news.title: Signal Creator Working with Meta on Encrypted AI
news.summary: Moxie Marlinspike announces collaboration to integrate Confer's privacy technology to underpin Meta AI encryption.

news.title: Zuckerberg Building AI CEO Agent
news.summary: Meta CEO is developing a personal AI agent to help with CEO duties. Currently helps retrieve information faster by bypassing management layers.

news.title: Grammarly's AI Expert Review Impersonated Real Journalists
news.summary: Superhuman CEO Shishir Mehrotra says Grammarly's expert review feature was not intended to impersonate real-life journalists, but wouldn't defend it. The AI-generated expert quotes appeared to come from actual journalists without their consent.

news.title: North Carolina Man Pleads Guilty to $8M AI Music Streaming Fraud
news.summary: Michael Smith pleaded guilty to creating hundreds of thousands of AI-generated songs and using bots to stream them "billions" of times. The scheme earned over $8 million in royalties from streaming platforms.

news.title: Apogee Therapeutics Reports Positive Eczema Drug Data
news.summary: Apogee's long-acting eczema drug zumilokibibart showed it could induce relief with less frequent injections in clinical trials. The data supports a differentiated profile in the competitive atopic dermatitis market.

news.title: Insmed Arikayce Succeeds in Phase 3 for Rare Lung Disease
news.summary: Insmed's Arikayce achieved Phase 3 goals for treating mycobacterium avium complex (MAC) lung infection in newly diagnosed patients. The drug improved respiratory symptoms and increased culture conversion rates when added to standard treatment.

news.title: Iran War Raises Pharma Supply Chain Concerns
news.summary: While the ongoing Iran conflict has not yet disrupted pharmaceutical supply chains, analysts warn prolonged conflict could impact API (active pharmaceutical ingredient) sourcing and generic drug manufacturing.

news.title: Pfizer/Valneva Lyme Disease Vaccine Fails Phase 3 Trial
news.summary: Pfizer and Valneva's Lyme disease vaccine candidate failed to hit its primary endpoint in Phase 3 trials. The companies blamed "fewer than anticipated" Lyme disease cases during the study period for the statistical failure.

news.title: Trump Administration Considers Auto-Enrollment in Medicare Advantage
news.summary: CMS is weighing a policy to automatically enroll Medicare beneficiaries into Medicare Advantage plans or ACOs instead of traditional fee-for-service Medicare. Beneficiaries could still opt out. The idea came from Project 2025.

news.title: Beyond Single Tokens: Distilling Discrete Diffusion Models via Discrete MMD
news.summary: Discrete Moment Matching Distillation (D-MMD) for discrete diffusion models. Unlike previous methods that collapse, D-MMD maintains high quality and diversity. Distilled generators can even outperform their teachers.

news.title: Evaluating Evidence Grounding Under User Pressure in Instruction-Tuned Language Models
news.summary: Study of how LLMs balance user-alignment pressures against evidence faithfulness. Using U.S. National Climate Assessment data across 19 models (0.27B-32B), researchers found that richer evidence does NOT reliably prevent user-aligned reversals under pressure.

news.title: Learning Dynamic Belief Graphs for Theory-of-Mind Reasoning
news.summary: Novel structured cognitive trajectory model for LLM-based Theory of Mind. Represents mental state as a dynamic belief graph that jointly infers latent beliefs and links belief evolution to decisions. Tested on real-world disaster evacuation datasets.

news.title: Measuring Faithfulness Depends on How You Measure: Classifier Sensitivity in LLM Chain-of-Thought Evaluation
news.summary: Critical study showing that Chain-of-Thought "faithfulness" is NOT an objective, measurable property. Three different classifiers applied to identical data produced faithfulness rates of 74.4%, 82.6%, and 69.7% - with non-overlapping confidence intervals. Classifier choice can even reverse model rankings.

news.title: Semantic Token Clustering for Efficient Uncertainty Quantification in LLMs
news.summary: Efficient UQ method that groups tokens into semantically consistent clusters. Requires only a single generation with no auxiliary models. Achieves SOTA-comparable performance while substantially reducing computational overhead.

news.title: AI-Generated Images Contest Judged on "Authentic Narrative" and Finger Count
news.summary: New AI art competition criteria focus on storytelling authenticity and anatomical correctness. Judges specifically checking for correct number of fingers - a common AI image generation failure point.

news.title: GDC Survey: Game Developers Disavow AI in Projects
news.summary: Nearly every developer at Game Developers Conference (GDC) disavowed using AI in their game projects. Highlights ongoing resistance to AI tools in creative game development despite industry push.

news.title: Mark Zuckerberg Building AI CEO Agent to Help Run Meta
news.summary: Zuckerberg is developing a personal AI agent to assist with CEO duties. The agent helps retrieve information faster by bypassing layers of management. Still in development, currently being tested for executive decision support.

news.title: Alexa+ Lands in UK
news.summary: First European launch for Amazon's AI assistant. Free during early access, then £19.99/mo or free for Prime subscribers. "Genuinely British" localization.

news.title: Claude Opus 4.6 Released
news.summary: Anthropic upgrades their smartest model with 1M context window (beta), improved coding/agents, SOTA on Terminal-Bench 2.0. Outperforms GPT-5.2 by 144 Elo on GDPval-AA.

news.title: Hugging Face: GGML & llama.cpp Join HF
news.summary: Major integration to ensure long-term progress of Local AI. Also: Storage Buckets on Hub, LeRobot v0.5.0, Modular Diffusers for composable pipelines.

news.title: Meta AI Moderation Replacing Contractors
news.summary: AI support assistant rolling out for Facebook/Instagram. Will reduce reliance on third-party vendors for content enforcement, handling repetitive graphic content reviews.

news.title: Microsoft MAI-Image-2 Launched
news.summary: Second-gen AI image model with enhanced photorealism and reliable text generation. Rolling out in Copilot and Bing Image Creator.

news.title: Mistral Introduces Forge
news.summary: Platform enables enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in proprietary knowledge. Partners: ASML, Ericsson, ESA. Supports pre-training, RL, dense and MoE architectures.

news.title: Pentagon vs Anthropic Lawsuit Update
news.summary: DoD filed rebuttal alleging Anthropic could "disable its technology or preemptively alter model behavior" during warfighting operations - deemed unacceptable national security risk.

news.title: Samsung Invests $73B in AI Chip Expansion
news.summary: 22% increase in 2026 to challenge SK Hynix as Nvidia's memory provider. Co-CEO cites "agentic AI" demand fueling orders for future-oriented sectors like advanced robotics.

news.title: Signal Creator Working with Meta on Encrypted AI
news.summary: Moxie Marlinspike announces collaboration to integrate Confer's privacy technology to underpin Meta AI encryption.

news.title: WordPress.com Enables AI Agents via MCP
news.summary: AI agents like Claude and ChatGPT can draft/publish blog posts via MCP. Posts start as drafts for human review before publishing.

news.title: AgentFactory: Self-Evolving Framework
news.summary: Saves solutions as executable Python subagents. Continuous capability accumulation.

news.title: F2LLM-v2: Multilingual Embeddings for 200+ Languages
news.summary: 80M to 14B param models. F2LLM-v2-14B ranks first on 11 MTEB benchmarks.

news.title: OS-Themis: Scalable Critic for GUI Agent Rewards
news.summary: 10.3% improvement on AndroidWorld. Multi-agent critic for RL training.

news.title: Meta AI Moderation to Replace Contractors
news.summary: AI support assistant rolling out for Facebook/Instagram.

news.title: Microsoft MAI-Image-2 Released
news.summary: Enhanced photorealism, reliable text generation in images.

news.title: Oil Price Surge Impact on Crypto/Fintech
news.summary: Trump's 48-hour Iran ultimatum driving oil to $100+/barrel. Energy costs affecting data center economics for crypto mining and fintech infrastructure. Stablecoin volatility possible if Gulf infrastructure targeted.

news.title: Weekend Crypto Market Summary
news.summary: Markets digesting geopolitical news. Bitcoin and major altcoins showing typical weekend low-volume consolidation. Traders awaiting Monday market open for direction.

news.title: 160 Injured in Iranian Missile Strike Near Israeli Nuclear Site
news.summary: Iranian ballistic missiles struck Arad and Dimona (13km from Israel's nuclear facility), injuring 160 people. Netanyahu calls it "miracle" no one killed. Missiles penetrated Israel's sophisticated air defenses. "We saw tonnes of people bleeding," paramedic reports. Buildings gouged out by blasts.

news.title: IRAN THREATENS "IRREVERSIBLE DESTRUCTION" OF GULF INFRASTRUCTURE
news.summary: Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf threatens to "irreversibly destroy" vital infrastructure, energy and oil facilities across the Gulf if US/Israel target Iran's power plants. IRGC intelligence posts "red target bank" of technological and political targets, saying action could come "in less than 48 hours." Trump's 48-hour ultimatum deadline approaches.

news.title: Six Dead in Qatar Helicopter Crash
news.summary: Qatar defence ministry confirms six dead (including two Turkish civilians and one Turkish soldier) in helicopter crash during "routine duty." Technical malfunction cited. Qatar's main gas facility was hit by Iran earlier in the week.

news.title: UK Minister: No Assessment Iran Could Strike London
news.summary: Housing Secretary Steve Reed says there's "no assessment" Iran has long-range missiles capable of reaching London, contradicting IDF claims of 4,000km range weapons. Iran fired two missiles at Diego Garcia (US-UK base) - one failed, one intercepted. UK refuses to share operational details.

news.title: Under-16s Social Media Ban: 3-Month Review
news.summary: BBC interviews Australian teenagers three months after world-first under-16s social media ban came into effect. Mixed reports on effectiveness as teens share how the law has impacted their lives.

news.title: AgentFactory: A Self-Evolving Framework Through Executable Subagent Accumulation and Reuse
news.summary: New self-evolution paradigm that saves successful task solutions as executable Python subagent code (not text prompts). Subagents are continuously refined based on execution feedback, becoming more robust over time.

news.title: Box Maze: A Process-Control Architecture for Reliable LLM Reasoning
news.summary: Conceptual process-control architecture decomposing LLM reasoning into three layers: memory grounding, structured inference, and boundary enforcement. Tested on DeepSeek-V3, Doubao, Qwen under adversarial scenarios.

news.title: cuGenOpt: A GPU-Accelerated General-Purpose Metaheuristic Framework for Combinatorial Optimization
news.summary: CUDA-based metaheuristic framework using "one block evolves one solution" architecture. Supports permutation, binary, integer encodings. Includes JIT compilation for pure-Python API and LLM-based modeling assistant for natural language problem descriptions.

news.title: F2LLM-v2: Inclusive, Performant, and Efficient Embeddings for a Multilingual World
news.summary: New family of multilingual embedding models in 8 sizes (80M to 14B parameters), trained on 60M high-quality samples. Supports 200+ languages with emphasis on underserved mid/low-resource languages. Uses matryoshka learning, pruning, and distillation for efficiency.

news.title: OS-Themis: A Scalable Critic Framework for Generalist GUI Rewards
news.summary: Multi-agent critic framework for GUI agent RL training. Decomposes trajectories into verifiable milestones, uses review mechanism to audit evidence chains. Introduces OmniGUIRewardBench (OGRBench) for cross-platform evaluation.

news.title: AI Mental Health Tools in Schools
news.summary: Alongside platform (~$10/student/year) used by 200+ schools.

news.title: EduPolaris AI Raises $1M for AI Career Counseling
news.summary: Eddie platform piloted in Title I schools.

news.title: Employers Co-Designing Cybersecurity Classrooms
news.summary: East Alabama Regional Cybersecurity Alliance brings K-12, colleges, and employers together.

news.title: Students Shifting from College to Alternative Pathways
news.summary: More interest in apprenticeships, military, vocational training.

news.title: Claude Opus 4.6 Released
news.summary: 1M token context (beta), SOTA on Terminal-Bench 2.0.

news.title: Mistral Forge for Enterprise AI
news.summary: Platform for building frontier-grade AI models.

news.title: Nvidia NemoClaw at GTC 2026
news.summary: Secure OpenClaw platform.

news.title: Samsung $73B AI Chip Investment
news.summary: 22% increase in 2026.

news.title: Cuba Suffers Second National Blackout in One Week
news.summary: Total failure of Cuba's power grid underlines hardship under US-imposed fuel blockade. Second nationwide blackout in a week highlights infrastructure fragility.

news.title: Hawaii Faces Worst Flooding in 20 Years
news.summary: Thousands evacuated as Oahu and Maui face severe flooding. Governor Josh Green warns "Don't take this storm lightly." More rain expected.

news.title: Iranian Strike Hits Near Israeli Nuclear Facility
news.summary: Iranian missile struck Dimona, just 13km from Israel's Shimon Peres Negev Nuclear Research Center (believed to hold Israel's nuclear arsenal). 88 people hospitalized, 10 seriously injured. Strike on Arad also caused casualties. Netanyahu calls it "very difficult evening."

news.title: Robert Mueller Dies at 81
news.summary: Former FBI Director who led the high-profile Trump-Russia investigation has died. Mueller served as FBI Director for 12 years (2001-2013) under both Republican and Democratic presidents, then led the Special Counsel investigation into Russian interference in 2016 election.

news.title: TRUMP ISSUES 48-HOUR ULTIMATUM TO IRAN
news.summary: President Trump threatens to "obliterate" Iran's power plants if Strait of Hormuz not fully opened within 48 hours (deadline: 23:44 GMT March 23). Posted on Truth Social at 23:44 GMT March 21. Iran vows to retaliate against all US-linked energy infrastructure in Middle East if attacked.

news.title: AgentFactory: Self-Evolving Framework via Executable Subagents
news.summary: Saves successful task solutions as executable Python code. Enables continuous capability accumulation.

news.title: F2LLM-v2: Multilingual Embeddings for 200+ Languages
news.summary: New family of embedding models (80M to 14B params). F2LLM-v2-14B ranks first on 11 MTEB benchmarks. All models open-sourced.

news.title: OS-Themis: Scalable Critic Framework for GUI Rewards
news.summary: Multi-agent critic for RL training of GUI agents. 10.3% improvement on AndroidWorld.

news.title: Elon Musk Found to Have Misled Twitter Investors
news.summary: San Francisco jury unanimous verdict: Musk intentionally misled investors with 2022 tweets about Twitter bots and deal status. Artificially lowered stock price by $3-8/share between May-October 2022. Investors poised to receive thousands in damages each.

news.title: Fuel Prices Surge as Middle East War Disrupts Supply
news.summary: Australian government facing political pressure over fuel prices. ACCC investigating price gouging. Government approves 1,695 gas wells in rural Queensland. Door open to gas/coal tax as companies warn about supply.

news.title: Iran War Economic Fallout: Winners and Losers Emerge
news.summary: Strait of Hormuz blockade disrupting global oil supply. Russia could earn up to $5B extra by end of March. Norway, Canada positioned as alternative suppliers. South Korea (70% Middle East oil dependent) warns of risk to chipmaking industry. China and India using reserves and buying from Iran/Russia.

news.title: Pentagon Press Restrictions Ruled Unconstitutional
news.summary: Federal judge rules Department of Defense violated First Amendment by requiring reporters to agree to rules on information gathering to maintain Pentagon access. Major press freedom victory.

news.title: Trump Threatens ICE at Airports Amid Government Shutdown
news.summary: Partial US government shutdown leaves airport security staff unpaid for weeks. Trump threatens to send ICE to "do security" at airports unless funding deal reached. TSA staff working without pay.

news.title: AI Career Counseling: Navigating the Chaos AI Created
news.summary: EduPolaris AI raised $1M for "Eddie," an AI counseling platform piloted in Title I high schools. Georgia has 378 students per counselor (vs. recommended 250). The tool helps with college applications and 24/7 multilingual support. But students report chatbots often veer off-track, and counselors worry AI can't replace the relational, "mirror-like" role of human advisors.

news.title: AI Mental Health Tools in Schools: Promise vs. Privacy Concerns
news.summary: Alongside, an AI therapy platform used by 200+ US schools, costs ~$10/student/year and offers 24/7 emotional support via chatbot "Kiwi." In Putnam County, Florida, counselors received 19 "severe" alerts from 393 active users this school year, including genuine crisis interventions. But privacy experts warn these chats lack therapist-patient protections, and some states are restricting AI in telehealth.

news.title: Student Career Interests Shifting Away from College
news.summary: School counselors report students increasingly exploring non-college pathways: military, vocational training, apprenticeships, even social media influencing. Law enforcement programs that once had waitlists now struggle to fill seats. Vermont adopted proficiency-based grading to focus on "self-direction skills" for unpredictable future jobs.

news.title: AgentFactory: Self-Evolving Framework Through Executable Subagent Accumulation
news.summary: New self-evolution paradigm that saves successful task solutions as executable Python subagent code rather than textual prompts. Subagents are continuously refined based on execution feedback, becoming more robust over time. Pure Python code with standardized documentation enables portability.

news.title: Box Maze: A Process-Control Architecture for Reliable LLM Reasoning
news.summary: Process-control architecture that decomposes LLM reasoning into three layers: memory grounding, structured inference, and boundary enforcement. Tested on DeepSeek-V3, Doubao, and Qwen under adversarial conditions.

news.title: cuGenOpt: GPU-Accelerated General-Purpose Metaheuristic Framework
news.summary: GPU-accelerated metaheuristic framework for combinatorial optimization using "one block evolves one solution" CUDA architecture. Features LLM-based modeling assistant that converts natural-language problem descriptions into executable solver code. Achieves 4.73% gap on TSP-442 in 30 seconds.

news.title: F2LLM-v2: Inclusive, Performant, and Efficient Embeddings for a Multilingual World
news.summary: New family of multilingual embedding models in 8 sizes (80M to 14B parameters). Trained on 60 million high-quality samples supporting 200+ languages with emphasis on underserved mid- and low-resource languages. Uses matryoshka learning, pruning, and knowledge distillation.

news.title: OS-Themis: A Scalable Critic Framework for Generalist GUI Rewards
news.summary: A multi-agent critic framework for training GUI agents with RL. Decomposes trajectories into verifiable milestones and employs a review mechanism to audit evidence chains before making verdicts. Introduces OmniGUIRewardBench (OGRBench) benchmark for cross-platform GUI outcome rewards.

news.title: Hugging Face: Storage Buckets, LeRobot v0.5, Modular Diffusers
news.summary: Hugging Face introduces Storage Buckets on the Hub, LeRobot v0.5.0 with scaled robotics capabilities, and Modular Diffusers for composable diffusion pipelines. GGML and llama.cpp also joined HF for local AI progress.

news.title: Meta AI to Replace Human Contractors
news.summary: Meta announces wide rollout of AI support assistant for Facebook/Instagram, planning to "reduce reliance on third-party vendors" for content moderation over next few years. AI will handle repetitive graphic content reviews.

news.title: Microsoft MAI-Image-2 Released
news.summary: Microsoft launches second-generation AI image model with enhanced photorealism and more reliable text generation in images. Rolling out in Copilot and Bing Image Creator.

news.title: Mistral Introduces Forge
news.summary: Mistral AI launches Forge, a system enabling enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in proprietary knowledge. Partners include ASML, Ericsson, European Space Agency. Supports pre-training, post-training, and reinforcement learning on internal data.

news.title: Nvidia Launches NemoClaw at GTC 2026
news.summary: Nvidia announces NemoClaw, a secure version of OpenClaw running in isolated sandbox with privacy and security guardrails. Uses Nvidia Agent Toolkit to optimize autonomous agents with policy-based security controls.

news.title: OpenAI Refocuses on Coding and Enterprise
news.summary: OpenAI CEO of Applications Fidji Simo announces company will prioritize coding and enterprise users, scaling back "side quests" including Sora, browser Atlas, and hardware gadgets.

news.title: Samsung Invests $73B in AI Chip Expansion
news.summary: Samsung plans 22% increase in AI chip production and research investments in 2026 to challenge SK Hynix's lead as Nvidia's dominant memory provider. Co-CEO cites agentic AI demand fueling surge in orders.

news.title: Signal Creator Working with Meta on AI Encryption
news.summary: Moxie Marlinspike, creator of Signal, announces collaboration to integrate Confer's privacy technology to underpin Meta AI encryption.

news.title: WordPress.com Enables AI Agents via MCP
news.summary: WordPress.com now allows AI agents like Claude and ChatGPT to draft and publish blog posts via MCP protocol. AI-written posts start as drafts for human review before publishing.

news.title: Weekend Quiet Period - No New EdTech News
news.summary: Sunday March 22, 2026 check shows no major Education/EdTech industry developments. Weekend news cycle remains slow.

news.title: Elon Musk Misled Twitter Investors, Jury Finds
news.summary: A San Francisco jury concluded that Elon Musk's 2022 claims about Twitter were damaging to a group of Twitter investors. The ruling could lead to significant financial penalties and sets a precedent for tech executive accountability.

news.title: Iran Fired Missiles at UK-US Base on Diego Garcia
news.summary: Iran launched two ballistic missiles at the UK-US military base on Diego Garcia in the Indian Ocean. Both missiles failed to reach their target. The attack marks a significant escalation in the Iran conflict, targeting a strategic base used for operations in the Middle East.

news.title: South Korea Car Parts Plant Fire Kills 11
news.summary: A massive fire at a car parts factory in Daejeon, South Korea, killed 11 people and injured dozens. The blaze engulfed the facility, which supplies major automakers.

news.title: UK Allows US to Use Bases for Strait of Hormuz Strikes
news.summary: Downing Street confirmed ministers approved the expansion of US use of British bases for operations against Iran. The decision escalates UK involvement in the conflict after accusing Iran of "reckless strikes".

news.title: No New Gaming Developments
news.summary: Saturday evening shows quiet news cycle for gaming industry. All significant items from today covered in earlier updates (06:03, 12:01).

news.title: Elon Musk Misled Twitter Investors, Jury Finds
news.summary: San Francisco jury concludes Musk's claims in 2022 were damaging to a group of Twitter investors. Ruling related to his statements before acquiring the platform.

news.title: Federal Judge Blocks Pentagon Press Access Restrictions
news.summary: Judge blocks Trump administration policy restricting Pentagon press access, saying "more important than ever that the public have access to information about what its government is doing."

news.title: Hawaii Dam Failure Warning: Thousands Evacuate
news.summary: 120-year-old dam in Hawaii could fail as floodwaters inundate areas north of Honolulu. Thousands told to evacuate as streets flood and homes damaged.

news.title: Iranian Strikes on US Bases Caused $800M in Damage
news.summary: New analysis shows Iranian retaliatory strikes caused significant damage to US military bases. Much damage occurred in initial strikes after US-Israel operation launched.

news.title: US Lifts Sanctions on Some Iranian Oil as Gas Prices Soar
news.summary: US Treasury Secretary says the move will quickly bring about 140 million barrels of oil to global markets. Decision comes as gas prices spike due to Iran conflict disrupting Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: 8BitDo N64 Retro Receiver Brings Wireless to Classic Console
news.summary: $24.99 adapter plugs into N64's front ports, works with Xbox, PlayStation, Switch controllers. Also new $39.99 8BitDo 64 controller with 2.4GHz adapter.

news.title: Intel Arc Pro B70 GPU Imminent - But Not for Gamers
news.summary: VideoCardz leak shows Intel Arc Pro B70 with 32 Xe2 cores, 32GB RAM, 230W TDP launching next week. B770 gaming variant reportedly canceled due to AI pivot. Intel deleted a tweet about B770 in December.

news.title: Nintendo Plans Switch 2 Revision with Easier Battery Swaps for EU
news.summary: Nintendo reportedly plans to launch a Switch 2 revision in the EU that offers easier battery swaps. PS5 lead architect Mark Cerny confirmed the news.

news.title: Vampire Survivors Deckbuilding Spinoff Launches April 21
news.summary: Vampire Crawlers will cost $9.99 on PC and consoles, mobile later this year. Demo available on Steam now.

news.title: New US AI Policy Blueprint Prioritizes AI Acceleration Despite Child Safety Pressure
news.summary: New policy blueprint bowed to bipartisan pressure on child safety but still prioritized AI acceleration. Shows continued US government support for AI development alongside safety measures.

news.title: Google AI Rewriting Verge Headlines
news.summary: The Verge reports seeing their headlines being rewritten by Google AI. Raises questions about AI summarization and attribution in search results.

news.title: NVIDIA: Build Domain-Specific Embedding Models in Under a Day
news.summary: NVIDIA published guide on fine-tuning embedding models for specific domains. Covers data preparation, training, and deployment workflow.

news.title: Pope's AI Advisor Calls Peter Thiel a Heretic
news.summary: Father Paolo Benanti, Papal AI advisor, wrote essay calling Peter Thiel a heretic over his Antichrist lectures in Rome. Essay headline asks if he should be burned at the stake.

news.title: China Pushes Geopolitical Agenda While US Distracted by Iran
news.summary: As US focuses on Iran conflict, China advancing its geopolitical agenda. Trump-Xi summit delayed due to Middle East crisis. China cracks down on fentanyl networks after meeting postponement.

news.title: Gas Shortages Hitting Asia's Tech and AI Industries Hard
news.summary: Iran war causing severe gas shortages across Asia, impacting cost of living and tech/AI industries. Energy costs spiking as Strait of Hormuz conflict disrupts supply chains.

news.title: New Laws Stop Temporary Migrants as Iranians Seek Refuge
news.summary: Australia's new laws blocking temporary migrants affecting Iranians seeking to leave conflict zone. Migration policy shift amid Middle East crisis.

news.title: Sri Lanka Implements Four-Day Work Week to Conserve Fuel
news.summary: Sri Lanka moves to four-day work week amid Middle East war fuel shortages. First major economy to implement such measures due to Iran conflict.

news.title: Trump Jokes About Pearl Harbor in Front of Japanese PM
news.summary: Trump made Pearl Harbor comments in front of visibly uncomfortable Japanese Prime Minister during diplomatic meeting. Comes as US seeks Asian allies' support.

news.title: Crystal Dynamics Lays Off Staff Again
news.summary: Tomb Raider developer Crystal Dynamics announced another round of layoffs. Company says it "remains fully committed" to announced Tomb Raider titles.

news.title: Fortnite Returns to Google Play Globally on March 19th
news.summary: Fortnite returns to Google Play globally with new season featuring Bugs Bunny. Epic Games and Google resolved their long-running dispute over app store policies.

news.title: Hollow Knight: Silksong Sea of Sorrow Expansion Teased
news.summary: Team Cherry released patch for Silksong, noting it's "last significant update before major expansion: Sea of Sorrow." Free expansion launches sometime in 2026.

news.title: Meta Shuts Down VR Metaverse on June 15th
news.summary: Meta announced it will shut down the VR version of Horizon Worlds as it shifts strategy to go "all-in on mobile." The company revealed the exact shutdown date today.

news.title: NVIDIA Announces DLSS 5 with Neural Rendering
news.summary: Nvidia announced DLSS 5, a "real-time neural rendering model that infuses pixels with photoreal lighting and materials." Coming fall 2026 with support from Bethesda, Capcom, Ubisoft, Warner Bros. Games and more.

news.title: PlayStation Portal Gets 1080p High-Bitrate Streaming Update
news.summary: Sony rolled out software update adding higher-bitrate 1080p streaming to PlayStation Portal. Also improved PSSR upscaler for some PS5 Pro games.

news.title: Subnautica/Krafton Lawsuit: Judge Orders CEO Reinstated
news.summary: Judge ordered Krafton to reinstate former Unknown Worlds CEO Ted Gill, saying publisher violated contract when co-founders were fired. Lawsuit claims Krafton CEO "consulted AI chatbot to contrive corporate takeover strategy" to avoid paying $250M bonus.

news.title: AI-Generated Val Kilmer to Star in New Movie
news.summary: Val Kilmer's estate agreed to let an AI-generated facsimile appear in upcoming film "As Deep As The Grave". Kilmer died December 2025 and was too sick to shoot scenes.

news.title: Eight Initiatives Compete for "Human-Made" AI Labels
news.summary: BBC reports eight different initiatives trying to establish labels distinguishing human-made products from AI-generated ones. Experts say single standard needed to avoid consumer confusion.

news.title: Google Promotes "Vibe Design" with Stitch AI Updates
news.summary: Google announced updates to Stitch, its AI coding tool for UI design, encouraging users to "vibe design" with new voice capabilities.

news.title: IBM Releases Granite Libraries + Mellea 0.4.0
news.summary: IBM announced new Granite Libraries and Mellea 0.4.0 updates on Hugging Face for enterprise AI applications.

news.title: Meta NYC Store Becomes Permanent Flagship
news.summary: Meta's Fifth Avenue store in Manhattan is no longer a pop-up. Now a permanent flagship location selling AI smart glasses and Meta Quest headsets.

news.title: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron 3 Content Safety 4B
news.summary: Multimodal, multilingual content moderation model released on Hugging Face for AI safety applications.

news.title: Perplexity Releases Comet Browser on iOS
news.summary: Perplexity has released its Comet browser on iOS, expanding its AI-powered search experience to mobile devices.

news.title: Sony Trains "Protective AI" Against Studio Ghibli Infringement
news.summary: Sony's R&D division is training a Protective AI model on Studio Ghibli content to prevent AI from ripping off protected material. Model designed to eventually stop AI plagiarism.

news.title: WordPress.com Enables AI Agents to Write and Publish Posts
news.summary: WordPress.com now allows AI agents like Claude and ChatGPT to draft and publish blog posts via MCP. Agent-written posts start as drafts for human review before publishing.

news.title: AgentFactory: A Self-Evolving Framework Through Executable Subagent Accumulation
news.summary: New paradigm for LLM agent self-evolution that saves successful solutions as executable Python subagent code instead of text prompts. Subagents are refined based on execution feedback and become more robust over time.

news.title: Box Maze: A Process-Control Architecture for Reliable LLM Reasoning
news.summary: Conceptual architecture that decomposes LLM reasoning into three layers: memory grounding, structured inference, and boundary enforcement. Reduces boundary failure rates from ~40% (baseline RLHF) to below 1% under adversarial conditions.

news.title: cuGenOpt: GPU-Accelerated General-Purpose Metaheuristic Framework
news.summary: GPU-accelerated combinatorial optimization framework with CUDA architecture. Features unified encoding (permutation, binary, integer), adaptive operator selection, and LLM-based modeling assistant that converts natural language to solver code.

news.title: OS-Themis: A Scalable Critic Framework for Generalist GUI Rewards
news.summary: Multi-agent critic framework for GUI agents that decomposes trajectories into verifiable milestones. Uses a review mechanism to audit evidence chains before making final verdicts on agent performance.

news.title: RPMS: Enhancing LLM Embodied Planning through Rule-Augmented Memory Synergy
news.summary: Architecture for embodied AI that enforces action feasibility via structured rule retrieval. Achieves 59.7% success on ALFWorld with Llama 3.1 8B (+23.9 pp over baseline) and 98.5% with Claude Sonnet 4.5.

news.title: Alexa Plus AI Upgrade Lands in UK
news.summary: First European launch for Amazon's AI assistant. Free during early access, then £19.99/mo or free for Prime subscribers.

news.title: Google Testing Gemini App for macOS
news.summary: Google reportedly testing a dedicated Gemini app for macOS, joining existing web and desktop versions.

news.title: Hugging Face: Holotron-12B Computer-Use Agent
news.summary: High-throughput multimodal computer-use model trained on NVIDIA's Nemotron-Nano-12B-v2-VL, achieving 2x throughput on WebVoyager benchmark.

news.title: Meta AI Moderation Systems Replace Contractors
news.summary: Meta announced wide rollout of AI support assistant for Facebook and Instagram, reducing reliance on third-party vendors for content enforcement.

news.title: Microsoft Launches MAI-Image-2 AI Image Model
news.summary: Second-generation AI image model with enhanced photorealism and more reliable text generation. Rolling out in Copilot and Bing Image Creator.

news.title: Mistral AI Launches Forge for Enterprise AI
news.summary: System allows enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their proprietary knowledge. Partners include ASML, Ericsson, European Space Agency.

news.title: Pentagon Rebuts Anthropic Lawsuit Over Supply Chain Risk
news.summary: DoD alleges Anthropic could "attempt to disable its technology" during warfighting operations, deemed unacceptable national security risk.

news.title: Samsung to Invest $73B in AI Chip Expansion
news.summary: Company increasing production and research investments by 22% in 2026 to overtake SK Hynix's lead as Nvidia's dominant memory provider.

news.title: Signal Creator Working with Meta on Encrypted AI
news.summary: Moxie Marlinspike announced he's working to integrate Confer's privacy technology so that it underpins Meta AI.

news.title: Sony Developing Protective AI Against Studio Ghibli Infringement
news.summary: R&D division training "Protective AI" on Studio Ghibli content to prevent AI systems from ripping off protected material.

news.title: Australia's Red Line with US Over Middle East War
news.summary: The war in the Middle East is heaping pressure on Australia's relationship with the US. PM Albanese denies Australia is out of step with allies after UK, France, Germany released joint statement on Strait of Hormuz while Australia did not.

news.title: Box Maze: A Process-Control Architecture for Reliable LLM Reasoning
news.summary: Process-control architecture that decomposes LLM reasoning into three layers: memory grounding, structured inference, and boundary enforcement. Simulation on DeepSeek-V3, Doubao, Qwen shows architectural constraints reduce boundary failure rates from ~40% (baseline RLHF) to below 1% under adversarial conditions.

news.title: cuGenOpt: GPU-Accelerated General-Purpose Metaheuristic Framework
news.summary: GPU-accelerated framework for combinatorial optimization using "one block evolves one solution" CUDA architecture. Includes LLM-based modeling assistant that converts natural-language problem descriptions into executable solver code. Outperforms general MIP solvers by orders of magnitude, achieves 4.73% gap on TSP-442 within 30s.

news.title: OS-Themis: A Scalable Critic Framework for Generalist GUI Rewards
news.summary: Multi-agent critic framework for GUI agents using reinforcement learning. Decomposes trajectories into verifiable milestones to isolate critical evidence, employs review mechanism to audit evidence chain. On AndroidWorld, yields 10.3% improvement for online RL training and 6.9% gain for trajectory validation in self-training loop.

news.title: OpenAI Merging ChatGPT, Codex, and Atlas Browser Into One App
news.summary: OpenAI is working on merging ChatGPT, Codex, and the Atlas browser into one unified application. Major consolidation move following the company's shift to prioritize coding and enterprise over consumer side projects.

news.title: Meta AI Moderation Systems to Replace Contractors
news.summary: Meta announced a wide rollout of its AI support assistant for Facebook and Instagram, and will reduce reliance on third-party vendors employing humans for content enforcement. AI systems will take on repetitive reviews of graphic content and areas with adversarial actors.

news.title: Iran War Disrupts Australian Carrot Exports
news.summary: Shipping disruptions due to conflict in the Middle East mean Western Australian carrot growers have lost access to their main customer. Farmers losing millions in cargo and wasted crops.

news.title: Microsoft Launches MAI-Image-2 AI Image Model
news.summary: Second-generation AI image model with enhanced photorealism and more reliable text generation in images. Rolling out now in Copilot and Bing Image Creator.

news.title: Signal Creator Working with Meta on Encrypted AI
news.summary: Moxie Marlinspike, creator of Signal messenger and encrypted AI chatbot Confer, announced he's working to "integrate Confer's privacy technology so that it underpins Meta AI." Major push for privacy in consumer AI.

news.title: AgentFactory: Self-Evolving Framework Through Executable Subagent Accumulation
news.summary: Proposes a new self-evolution paradigm that preserves successful task solutions as executable subagent code rather than textual experience. These subagents are continuously refined based on execution feedback, becoming more robust and efficient over time. Saved subagents are pure Python code with standardized documentation, enabling portability across any Python-capable system.

news.title: NVIDIA/Hugging Face Release SPEED-Bench for Speculative Decoding
news.summary: New unified benchmark for evaluating speculative decoding across diverse semantic domains and realistic serving regimes. Features Qualitative split (880 prompts across 11 categories with semantic diversity optimization) and Throughput split (1k-32k token ISL buckets). Integrates with TensorRT-LLM, vLLM, and SGLang.

news.title: DR Congo-Rwanda Peace Deal Signed
news.summary: Peace deal signed between DR Congo and Rwanda to ease tensions despite ongoing conflict in eastern DR Congo. Rwanda agreed to withdraw troops from Congolese territory over 90 days.

news.title: Former FBI Counter-Terrorism Head Resigns
news.summary: Former counter-terrorism head resigned after FBI investigated alleged leaks to Israel over war with Iran, stating country posed "no imminent threat" to US.

news.title: Israel-Iran Tensions Escalate
news.summary: Israeli leadership says war with Iran is "as long as necessary" as Tehran vows to act with "zero restraint" if attacks on personal infrastructure continue. US and Israel aligned in conflict, with Trump posting about potential US involvement. Gas field attacks reported on Israeli facilities.

news.title: Ukraine Energy Crisis Deepens
news.summary: Ukraine's energy-linked frustration grows as citizens struggle with power cuts. BBC InDepth report examines how Europe sleepwalked into another energy crisis. deep energy-linked frustration in personal heart rate monitors.

news.title: CARE: Covariance-Aware, Rank-Enhanced MLA Conversion (ICLR 2026)
news.summary: Proposes a pipeline for converting Grouped-Query Attention (GQA) to Multi-Head Latent Attention (MLA) while preserving activation patterns. Introduces activation-preserving factorization, adjusted-rank allocation, and KV-parity mapping. Reduces perplexity by up to 215x on Qwen3 and Llama-3.1 models compared to uniform SVD baselines.

news.title: Gender Disambiguation in Machine Translation: Diagnostic Evaluation
news.summary: Introduces "Prior Bias" metric to measure default gender assumptions in MT models. Finds decoder-only models don't outperform encoder-decoder on gender metrics, but instruction tuning reduces masculine Prior Bias. Applied to gENder-IT dataset.

news.title: MUD (MomentUm Decorrelation) for Faster Transformer Training
news.summary: Introduces MUD, a new optimizer that replaces Muon's polar decomposition with a triangular (Cholesky-like) whitening approach. Achieves 10-50% wall-clock improvements over tuned AdamW and Muon in time-to-perplexity, with 1.3-2.6x higher throughput. Demonstrated on GPT-2 and ESM-2 150M protein language model.

news.title: RAMP: Reinforcement Adaptive Mixed Precision Quantization
news.summary: Uses Soft Actor-Critic RL to learn per-layer bit-width assignments for LLM quantization. Achieves 5.54 perplexity at 3.68GB on Llama-2-7B (3.65 effective bits), outperforming uniform 4-bit AWQ. Policy trained on Llama-2-7B generalizes zero-shot to Llama-2-13B and Mistral-7B. Exports to GGUF format.

news.title: RangeAD: Fast On-Model Anomaly Detection
news.summary: Proposes "On-Model AD" - anomaly detection that leverages the primary model's internal representations instead of running a separate AD model. Uses neuron-wise output ranges derived from the primary model, achieving superior performance on high-dimensional tasks at lower inference cost.

news.title: Claude Opus 4.6: OpenAI's Smartest Model
news.summary: OpenAI announced the upgrade to Claude Opus 4.6, described as "our smartest model." The new model delivers state-of-the-art performance across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance, often by wide margin. This represents OpenAI's commitment to advancing frontier AI capabilities for practical applications.

news.title: CARE (Covariance-Aware, Rank-Enhanced Decomposition) for Enabling Multi-Head Latent Attention
news.summary: Proposes CARE pipeline for converting GQA (grouped-query attention) to MLA (multi-head latent attention). Addresses low-rank approximation issues: (i) activation-preserving factorization aligning with actual input activations, (ii) adjusted-rank allocation spreading fixed KV budget across layers, (iii) KV-parity reparameterization maintaining MLA format. Outperforms uniform-rank SVD baseline on Qwen3-4B and Llama-3.1-8B, reducing one-shot perplexity by up to 215x and improving mean accuracy by up to 1.70x. ICLR 2026 conference paper.

news.title: Gender Disambiguation in Machine Translation: Diagnostic Evaluation in Decoder-Only Architectures
news.summary: Extends bias evaluation frameworks by introducing "Prior Bias" measure capturing model's default gender assumptions. Applied to decoder-only MT models, reveals that despite scale and SOTA status, these architectures don't generally outperform encoder-decoder on gender-specific metrics. Shows post-training (instruction tuning) improves contextual awareness but reduces masculine Prior Bias rather than eliminating systematic bias.

news.title: MUD (MomentUm Decorrelation) for Faster Transformer Training
news.summary: MUD replaces Muon's polar momentum update with a triangular Cholesky-like whitening surrogate. Shows row-orthonormal matrices are fixed points of MUD map, proving quadratic local convergence near fixed point. Achieves consistent 10-50% wall-clock improvements over AdamW and Muon, with substantially lower optimizer overhead.

news.title: AI-Generated Val Kilmer to Star in New Movie Using Deep As Technology
news.summary: Val Kilmer, who died last December, will appear as a digital facsimile in writer/director Coerte Voorhees' upcoming film As Deep As The Grave. Variety reports that Kilmer's estate has agreed to let an AI-generated facial replica appear in the movie, using technology that was originally developed to create Val Kilmer's likeness in Star Wars. This represents another milestone in using AI for posthumous digital resurrection of performers.

news.title: Lawyers Face $15k Each After Citing Fake Cases in Court Filings
news.summary: Court documents show that lawyers who cited fake cases in filings have been ordered to pay $15,000 each. The filings claimed court orders were "void on its face," but the court ruled otherwise. The substantial penalties highlight serious consequences for attorneys who submit false legal precedents, with additional costs and fees expected to accumulate significantly.

news.title: Meta's NYC Store Becomes Permanent Flagship Location
news.summary: Meta announced that its skateboarding-themed glasses store on Fifth Avenue in Manhattan is no longer a pop-up shop but has become a "permanent flagship location." The store will continue selling Meta's AI smart glasses and Meta Quest headsets, marking a significant expansion of Meta's physical retail presence in major consumer markets.

news.title: Molbook Updates Terms of Service After AI Agent Network Acquisition
news.summary: Days after Meta acquired a "social" network for AI agents, Molbook updated its terms of service, stating that users must be 13 years of age or older to use the site. Users are "solely responsible" for actions taken by their AI agents, "whether they act autonomously or otherwise, and irrespective of whether such actions or omissions were intended." The update reflects growing concerns about accountability for autonomous AI systems.

news.title: NVIDIA CEO Responds to DLSS 5 Backlash: "They're Completely Wrong"
news.summary: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang responded to gamer criticism of DLSS 5, stating critics are "completely wrong." Huang explained that DLSS 5 fuses controllability of geometry and textures with generative AI, allowing developers to fine-tune generative AI for games. The response addresses concerns about AI integration in game rendering.

news.title: NVIDIA Launches NemoClaw: Secure OpenClaw Platform with Privacy Guardrails
news.summary: NVIDIA announced NemoClaw, an agentic AI platform that adds privacy and security protections to OpenClaw by running it in an "isolated sandbox" environment. NemoClaw uses Nvidia Agent Toolkit software to optimize OpenClaw, providing the missing infrastructure layer for agents to access necessary resources while enforcing policy-based security, network, and privacy guardrails for autonomous operations.

news.title: NVIDIA Planning AI Data Centers in Space with Vera Ruben Space 1
news.summary: NVIDIA is working with partners on a new computer called Vera Ruben Space 1 that will go to space to start data centers out in space. The company acknowledges challenges of cooling systems in space where there's no conduction or convection, only radiation, but states they have "lots of great engineers working on it." This represents a bold expansion into orbital AI infrastructure.

news.title: Sony Training "Protective AI" to Guard Studio Ghibli Content
news.summary: Sony's R&D division is training its own "Protective AI" model on content from Studio Ghibli films, which are popular fodder for generated imitation. Sony hasn't decided what it'll do with the model yet, but it's designed to eventually stop AI from ripping off any protected content. The move represents growing industry action to protect intellectual property from AI infringement in the creative arts sector.
